title: well_assess_sovereign_entropy (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `well_assess_sovereign_entropy`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing well schema for `well_assess_sovereign_entropy` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Agent must not convert Arif into a fixed symbol. That would violate sovereignty.

sovereignty_guard.description: §3.P — Hard guard against symbolic overreach on the operator.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every well_assess_sovereign_entropy output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
